footer.address: Pionir Ice Park, Čarli Čaplina 39, Belgrade

hero.lead: Ice hockey at the heart of Vojvodina. Passion, teamwork, and fair play since 2014.

about.title: Passion on the ice, community off it
about.description: Founded in 2014, Vojvodina HC is a club that stands behind every player — whether a veteran or lacing up skates for the first time.

pillars.passionText: Every practice, every game — no compromises.
pillars.unityText: We play for each other, above all else.
pillars.fairText: We respect opponents, referees, and the game.
pillars.communityText: A club connecting generations of Vojvodina hockey.

cta.title: Ready for the ice?
cta.description: Join our practices — beginners welcome, gear can be rented on site.

newsPage.title: Latest from Vojvodina HC
newsPage.description: Matches, tournaments, new jerseys, and stories from the club.
newsPage.empty: No news yet. Check back soon.

events.title: Club calendar
events.description: Tournaments, friendly matches, open practices, and meetups.
